---
title: "Location"
---


Gefeiert wird im Kranwerk Naunhof.

***Beispiel Karte 1***

<iframe width="425" height="350" src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=12.592823803424837%2C51.279219487910325%2C12.593716979026794%2C51.28070263084513&amp;layer=mapnik" style="border: 1px solid black"></iframe>

<br/>


***Beispiel Karte 2***

<iframe 
    width="100%" 
    height="450" 
    frameborder="0" 
    scrolling="no" 
    marginheight="0" 
    marginwidth="0"
    src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=12.589470417113893%2C51.27505271434776%2C12.599470417113893%2C51.28505271434776&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=51.28005271434776%2C12.594470417113893">
</iframe>
